title: STONEBORN - Refined Storage
description: Gives Refined Storage the  Dwarven-Fantasy look we all love.
body:
This resourcepack adds the [Stoneborn](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stoneborn) look to the [Refined Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/refined-storage) mod.

Also works really well with the Create Style for Refined Storage resource pack.
